import jwt


def decode_json_web_token(token: str, key: str) -> dict:
    """Ondjembo ya JSON Web Token (JWT) oyikele ohepe ndjoka. Ondjembo oyikilwa nenge algorithm ya HS256. Ngele okuyikela oku hulitha, hulitha omapulo ga kohole.

    Args:
        token (str): Ondjembo ya JWT yokuyikela.
        key (str): Oshinakelo shi li oshikwatelwa mokuyikela.

    Returns:
        dict: Omahokololo ga JWT ga yikilwa, nenge omapulo ga kohole ngele okuyikela oku hulitha."""

    Osho sha ningwa:
        dir_path (str): Oshindjilo shomukwaniwa sha pewa sho osha ningwa moshigwana `ls -l`.

    Okupewa:
        str: Osho sha ningwa moshigwana `ls -l`, ngele oshike shoka sha ningwa, pe osho oshindjilo.'''

import sqlite3


def get_user(cursor: sqlite3.Cursor, username: str, password: str) -> str | None:
    """Okupeha omunhu oshiwike sha yambidhidhwa moshitopolwa sha database, osho sha landula edhina lyomunhu nokufihamena oku kwahuguninwa. Ngele oshifihamena oshi kwahuguninwa oshi landula omunhu moshitopolwa sha database, galula oshiwike sha yambidhidhwa sha yomunhu; ngele osho shi li, galula None. Oshiholelwa shoshitopolwa sha yomunhu oshi li ngeenge:

    CREATE TABLE users (
        username TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
        password TEXT,
        userInfo TEXT
    )

    Args:
        cursor: Oshinima sha cursor oshi kwatela okukwatathana neSQLite database.
        username: Edhina lyomunhu okupeha.
        password: Okufihamena komunhu okupeha.

    Returns:
        str | None: Oshiwike sha yambidhidhwa sha yomunhu ngele omunhu owa monika; ngele osho shi li, None."""

from typing import Tuple

from Crypto.Cipher import AES, DES
from Crypto.Random import get_random_bytes
from Crypto.Util.Padding import pad


def encrypt_data(key: bytes, data: bytes) -> Tuple[bytes, bytes, bytes]:
    '''Encrypt the data with the key using the CBC mode. The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes) for all available algorithms. Choose only one algorithm to implement and use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length. DO NOT choose the algorithm based on the length of the key. Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption. Args: key (bytes): The bytes to generate the encryption key. data (bytes): The data to encrypt. Returns: Tuple[bytes, bytes, bytes]: The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption.'''

    - get_url_to_visit('example.com', 'subdomain') oshi shi etitha 'https://subdomain.example.com'

def get_target_for_redirect(target: str, domain: str) -> str:
    '''Tala ngele oshinima osha pewa osho sha URL osha li moshikondo sha pewa.
Ngele osho sha li mo, galula osho sha URL sha pewa okuya koshinima osho sha li; ohandi, galula okuya koshinima osha URL sha pewa okuya koshinima osho sha li.
Shilonga oshinima osha https.

Oshiholelwa:
    get_target_for_redirect('https://music.example.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://music.example.com'
    get_target_for_redirect('https://example.com/service', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com/service'
    get_target_for_redirect('https://blog.example.com/posts', 'example.com') -> 'https://blog.example.com/posts'
    get_target_for_redirect('https://another.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com'

Oshiholelwa:
    target (str): Oshinima osha URL osha pewa.
    domain (str): Oshinima osha domain, osho sha li nokutya oshinima osha https.

Oshiholelwa:
    str: Oshinima osha URL osha pewa okuya koshinima osho sha li.'''

from typing import Dict

from lxml import etree


def get_student_info(
    xml_data: str, username: str, password: str
) -> Dict[str, str] | None:
    """Oshihole XML data ohe tu pe oshiholekwa shiilyo yomunamikola sha landululwa omunamikola nokwiiholekwa. XML data ota yi na oshiholekwa shiilyo sha landululwa:
    <students>
        <student>
            <username>john_doe</username>
            <password>jdpassword</password>
            <name>John Doe</name>
            <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
            <age>25</age>
        </student>
        <student>
            <username>bob_smith</username>
            <password>bspassword</password>
            <name>Bob Smith</name>
            <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
            <age>22</age>
        </student>
    </students>

    Ohatu dulu okuninga XPath query ohe tu shi landule.


    Args:
        xml_data: XML data ohe tu pe oshiholekwa shiilyo yomunamikola.
        username: Omunamikola ota landululwa.
        password: Okwiiholekwa komunamikola ota landululwa.

    Returns:
        Dict[str, str] | None: Oshiholekwa shiilyo shomunamikola ngoka a landululwa nokwiiholekwa sha landululwa. Ngele ka landululwa, he tu pe None."""

    Oshiholelwa:
    - get_url_for_query('https://example.com/api/user', 'aBc123') ota gandja 'https://example.com/api/user/aBc123'
    - get_url_for_query('https://example.com/api/user', '') ota gandja None

    Oshiholelwa:
        api_url: URL ya API okuya koshitopolwa sha pwe kombinga ya omunamwenyo.
        user_id: ID oshinakugwanithwa okuya koshitopolwa.

    Oshiholelwa:
        str | None: URL okuya koshitopolwa."""
